## Meet AIRA - Your AI Twin!

AI Agents remember all your interactions across calls, emails, SMS, and notes and use it to handle admin tasks like updating fields, setting reminders, and scheduling interviews—saving recruiters hours every week, boosting productivity, and driving more revenue.

## An ATS That Does More Than ‘Storing’ Data

### Candidate Lifecycle Management

From sourcing and screening to interviews and offers, manage the complete candidate lifecycle on a single platform

### Candidate Segmentation & Search

Identify and organize your top candidates as per your needs. Find them instantly when a  job order comes, ensuring a quick TAT

### Recruiterflow Business Intelligence

Create the most detailed reports and drive business insights. Present them as pie charts, bar or line graphs

FAQs

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Can I customise my recruiting pipelines for each job in the ATS?

Yes, you can! We think that your ATS should work around your process and not the other way around. You have complete freedom to customise workflow for each and every job.

### Can I control access levels of different users?

Yes! Our advanced access control gives you granular control over different fields and create custom roles for custom access control.

### What file formats does resume parser work on?

Our resume parser works on both PDFs, word documents as well as .rtf files. Also, our parser works in 30+ languages including English, German, French, Spanish & Portuguese.

### Can I migrate my data from another applicant tracking software(ATS)?

Yes you can! We offer data migration from most of the other leading ATS providers. Please get in touch with us to see if we can support your specific ATS for data migration.

### Can I submit candidates to clients via the system?

Yes, we have a super easy to use submittal workflow built in to make writing submittal emails super easy. You can also use our client portal for better experience and transparency with your clients.

### Is Recruiterflow’s ATS GDPR compliant?

Yes, we are. You can pick your own compliance option and stay GDPR compliant. Talk to our support team if you have any questions.

### Who owns the data in my ATS?

It’s your data and we would never do anything to restrict you from accessing your own data. You can export your data anytime you want using our API. We never share your data with anyone else.

Curious to know more? Book a demo and 
our team will walk you through everything in detail.
